title: Vidhing - Video Consultation Platform
problem: Video consultation tools are often generic and not optimized for healthcare workflows and compliance requirements.
solution: Healthcare-specific video consultation platform with EHR integration, secure messaging, and clinical workflow support.
technology: Video platform, healthcare integrations, secure communications
varden_fit: High — video consultation infrastructure could power Varden's telehealth offerings.
notes: Healthcare video infrastructure. Core building block for telehealth.
